name: MaxKB
what_it_does: Open-source enterprise AI agent platform that combines RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) with agentic workflows and MCP tool-use support. Enables document upload, web crawling, automatic text segmentation and vectorization, and zero-code integration into existing business systems for intelligent Q&A. Supports multiple LLM backends including DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen, OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini.
use_cases: Building enterprise knowledge base chatbots with RAG
Automating business processes with agentic workflows
Zero-code intelligent Q&A integration into existing systems
Multimodal document processing (text, image, audio, video)
Internal enterprise search and knowledge management
best_when: You need an enterprise-grade self-hosted RAG + agent platform with MCP tool-use support, especially if your team reads Chinese and wants a polished UI for knowledge base management.
avoid_when: You need English-first documentation, a lightweight solution, or don't want to manage PostgreSQL + pgvector infrastructure. Not an MCP server itself -- it consumes MCP tools rather than exposing them.

auth.notes: Default admin credentials: admin / MaxKB@123.. Self-hosted authentication.

pricing.notes: GPLv3 licensed. Free and open source. LLM API costs are separate depending on provider chosen.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Not an MCP server -- it is an MCP client/consumer that can use MCP tools. Documentation is primarily in Chinese.
known_agent_gotchas: This is an MCP CLIENT, not an MCP SERVER -- it consumes MCP tools, does not expose them
Documentation and UI are primarily in Chinese
GPLv3 license has copyleft implications for derivative works
Default credentials are insecure -- must change immediately in production

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
